name: OpenClaw Toolkit
author: Kairo
description: Cyrus Personal OpenClaw Toolkit - memory system, guardian mode, key management. Designed for portability: copy entire skill directory to new machine.

scripts.name: Memory Append Script
scripts.description: Write keyword-hit content to Obsidian daily memory file. Auto-categorize by type (lesson/decision/insight etc 12 types), append to YYYY-MM-DD-records.md.
scripts.trigger: Kairo auto-calls after detecting keywords in conversation, silent to user

scripts.name: Daily Memory Summary Script
scripts.description: Scan all daily records, dedupe, write to memory/MEMORY.md. Call before each session ends.
scripts.trigger: Before each session ends, or user manually triggers

scripts.name: Secure Credential Recovery
scripts.description: Decrypt secrets_*.encrypted.json files in E:\KEY BACKUP, extract account credentials. Used to recover Bilibili, email accounts etc.

scripts.name: QClaw Guardian Mode
scripts.description: Monitor QClaw process, auto-restart if crashed. Task Scheduler runs every 2 min. Ensures AI service stays online.

workflow.context: Cyrus is an entrepreneur. Core problem: info loss across sessions. Kairo is his AI agent. Goal: build portable tools that survive machine changes.
workflow.memory_system: keyword detection -> memory_append.ps1 -> memory_daily_summary.ps1 -> Obsidian. Kairo auto-calls at session end.
workflow.key_management: All credentials encrypted in E:\KEY BACKUP. secure_get.py decrypts on demand. No plaintext passwords in conversations.
workflow.guardian: Flag file + PowerShell script + Task Scheduler 2min loop. Keeps QClaw alive.
